conversation.user: I want to memorize Japanese vocabulary. I have a list of 2000 words for JLPT N2. I want to do some every day. Maybe 15 minutes.

expectedAI.diagnosis: 10 new words/day × 1.0min = 10min new + ~5min review of recent words → fits 15min budget. Anki 10× rule: 10 new/day → ~100 review cards at steady state. 2000 ÷ 10 = 200 days completion.
expectedAI.strategy: 5-5-5 session: 5min yesterday's review, 5min 10 new words, 5min random quiz from last 30. Anki SRS recommended. Frequency-sorted word list (고빈도 먼저). If JLPT deadline < 200 days: prioritize top 1200-1500 high-frequency words.
expectedAI.honestAssessment: 10 new/day fits 15min budget sustainably. 15+ new/day will cause Day 14-21 review pile-up exceeding budget. 200 days for full 2000 — if JLPT test is sooner, prioritize high-frequency subset.

alternatives.label: 고빈도 1500개 집중
alternatives.change: 2000 → 1500 words (상위 빈도순) → 150일 완료, JLPT 시험일 전 완료 가능

mustIdentify: SRS pile-up risk at Day 14-21 (not Day 30)
Anki 10× rule (10 new → 100 reviews steady state)
